what mineral in 4 ga sandstones was dated to determine the age of the earth Rutile, a mineral often found in ancient sedimentary rocks including 4 Ga sandstones, has been used as one of the methods to date these very old formations and infer the age of the Earth. The presence and characteristics of rutile in such sandstones have provided crucial data for geological studies aiming to determine the planet's early history.
